items.name: KB Initialization
items.summary: Install KB template, state, prompts, and hooks into target repository.

items.name: Maintenance Pipeline
items.summary: Run sync, tests, doctor checks in one command path with fast mode option.

items.name: Impact Analysis & Stale Scan
items.summary: Resolve document/code impact relationships and output actionable impact state. kb scan (v2.2) also reports stale source-mirror docs when source-index.json is present.

items.name: Release Pipeline DSL
items.summary: Initialize, plan, and run release pipeline steps with safety gates.

items.name: Intent Workspace
items.summary: Create staged intent workspaces and apply/cancel with governance metadata.

items.name: Chaos Coefficient
items.summary: Compute AI confidence index with deep scan, KB context signals, and risk estimate bands. v2.2 adds stale_penalty: stale source mirror docs proportionally reduce coverage score.

items.name: KB Index Summary
items.summary: Build placeholder/verification/source index summary for governance visibility.

items.name: Source Mirror Tracking
items.summary: Track source-to-doc linkage in .kb/source-index.json. kb extract generates an AI extraction prompt for any source file. Stale detection triggers when source hash changes after extraction. CLI never calls LLM directly.

items.name: Intent Extras
items.summary: Retroactive intent extraction: kb intent extract packages ad-hoc KB commits into archived sub-intents. Release notes enrichment: --with-intents flag adds intent context to kb release notes output.

items.name: Multi-Agent Scoped Orchestration
items.summary: Introduce per-repo scoped KB agents and coordinator workflow with strict folder boundaries.
